# discord_rules_channel (Resource)

Sets the rules channel of a Community-enabled Discord server (the channel where rules/guidelines are displayed). The server must have the Community feature enabled.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_text_channel" "rules" {
  name      = "rules"
  server_id = var.server_id
}

resource "discord_rules_channel" "rules" {
  server_id        = var.server_id
  rules_channel_id = discord_text_channel.rules.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `rules_channel_id` (String) The ID of the channel that will be used as the rules channel.
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server to set the rules channel for.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the server.
